SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model

Class LDCServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.scijava.AbstractContextual
org.scijava.plugin.AbstractRichPlugin
org.scijava.service.AbstractService
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
LDCService, Comparable<org.scijava.Prioritized>, org.scijava.Contextual, org.scijava.Disposable, org.scijava.Identifiable, org.scijava.Initializable, org.scijava.Locatable, org.scijava.log.Logged, org.scijava.plugin.HasPluginInfo, org.scijava.plugin.RichPlugin, org.scijava.plugin.SciJavaPlugin, org.scijava.Prioritized, org.scijava.service.SciJavaService, org.scijava.service.Service, org.scijava.Versioned
public class LDCServiceImpl extends org.scijava.service.AbstractService implements LDCService
The implementation of the LDCService. It delegates its operations to inner attributes.

Needs to be initialized by a call to the Service.initialize() method to be used, if manually created with its constructor.

    • enhanceContrast

      public void enhanceContrast(ij.process.ImageProcessor ip)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Enhances contrast for the given ImageProcessor. Does not modify the content of it, it is only a visual modification.
      Specified by:
      enhanceContrast in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      ip - The image processor to modify.
      See Also:
      • PreprocessingManager.enhanceContrast(ImageProcessor, boolean, double)

    • createPreviewMedianWorker

      public SwingWorker<Void,Void> createPreviewMedianWorker(ij.process.ImageProcessor ip)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Creates a SwingWorker, that applies a median filter preview on a given ImageProcessor if executed.
      Specified by:
      createPreviewMedianWorker in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      ip - The image processor to modify.
      See Also:
      • PreprocessingPreviewMedianWorker

    • createApplyMedianWorker

      public SwingWorker<Void,Void> createApplyMedianWorker(ij.ImageStack stack)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Creates a SwingWorker that applies a median filter on a given ImageStack if executed.
      Specified by:
      createApplyMedianWorker in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      stack - The array of images to process (slices).
      See Also:
      • PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker

      public void previewManualThreshold(ij.ImagePlus imp)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Preview manual threshold on the image.

      previewManualThreshold in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      imp - The image on which the preview must be done.

      public double[] previewAutoThreshold(ij.ImagePlus imp)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService

      previewAutoThreshold in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      imp - The image on which the preview must be done.
      Returns:

    • createMeasuresPreviewWorker

      public SwingWorker<ij.ImagePlus,Void> createMeasuresPreviewWorker(ij.ImagePlus img)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Create a SwingWorker, that take care of processing the preview of the selected measured parameters, it returns the preview as an image showing outlines of detected particles.
      Specified by:
      createMeasuresPreviewWorker in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      img - The current image to consider.
      See Also:
      • MeasuresPreviewWorker

    • createMeasuresProcessingWorker

      public SwingWorker<ij.measure.ResultsTable,Void> createMeasuresProcessingWorker(ij.ImagePlus img, ij.ImagePlus binaryImg)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Create a SwingWorker, that take care of processing measurements and returning them, if executed.
      Specified by:
      createMeasuresProcessingWorker in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      img - The current image to consider.
      See Also:
      • MeasuresProcessingWorker

    • exportResultsTable

      public void exportResultsTable(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt, String path)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Export as a CSV file the table passed in parameter.
      Specified by:
      exportResultsTable in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      rt - the ResultsTable to export as a CSV file.
      path - the path of the file as a String.

    • calculateSummaryTable

      public ij.measure.ResultsTable calculateSummaryTable(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Calculate the summary ResultTable generated by ImageJ.
      Specified by:
      calculateSummaryTable in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      rt - the ResultsTable to generate statistics from.
      Returns:
      the ResultsTable containing the statistics.

    • generateHistograms

      public List<ij.ImagePlus> generateHistograms(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Generate a list containing histograms for each columns of the ResultsTable.
      Specified by:
      generateHistograms in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      rt - ResultsTable to generated histograms from.
      Returns:
      List that contain ImagePlus Object of histograms for each column of the table.

    • createBatchWorker

      public SwingWorker<Void,Void> createBatchWorker(File inputDirectory, File outputFile, BatchWindow bw)
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Create a SwingWorker, that has the goal of applying particle analysis on a whole given directory images.
      Specified by:
      createBatchWorker in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      inputDirectory - The input directory where it has to find '.tif' and '.tiff' files.
      outputFile - The output '.csv' where it writes the results.
      bw - A reference to the BatchWindow creating this worker, needed to update the progress bar.
      See Also:
      • BatchWorker

    • saveAnalysis

      public void saveAnalysis(String outputPath) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Save current plug-in general state into a file (.json) specified by the outputPath.
      Specified by:
      saveAnalysis in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      outputPath - The path where the current plug-in state needs to be saved.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while attempting to save the file.
      See Also:
      • JSONManager.saveAnalysis(String, AnalysisSettings)

    • loadAnalysis

      public void loadAnalysis(String inputPath) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: LDCService
      Load a plug-in general state from a file (.json) specified by the inputPath, and the current state by it.
      Specified by:
      loadAnalysis in interface LDCService
      Parameters:
      inputPath - The path from where the new current plug-in state needs to be loaded.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while attempting to load the file.
      See Also:
      • JSONManager.loadAnalysis(String)
